reviews.review_description: This game is super simple but honestly I found it quite  addictive. Stuff flies at you and you just punch it—sounds basic, but once it speeds up you’re moving nonstop. It’s one of those games where you hop in for “a quick session” and end up playing way longer. There’s a bit of variety with different modes, which helps, . If you want something fun that also gets you moving, this does the job.

I did enjoy playing and it is something I will play again. How often I am not sure yet as have yet to experience the harder levels. It is as others have said a simple game but engaging . At its current price I would say its an an absolute bargain. 

My only gripe is possibly accuracy when hitting the balls. For some reason i have to lift my arms high and punch downwards towards the floor in order to hit anything. I admit it could just be I have a dreadful aim.

reviews.review_title: Float Like a Butterfly, Punch Like a ?
reviews.review_description: Punch on Meta Quest is an absolute knockout lol, the gameplay strikes a great balance between fun and fitness. It’s easy to pick up, but there’s enough depth to keep you coming back to try and beat that last high score.  I did get some cardo going so did get moving and I liked the football and fitness modes the most.

Graphics are nice 
I like the soccer level, feels like I’m playing ping pong, the boss clown is fun to beat, fitness mode is fun, has a lot of potential for those seeking a fun workout that’s not too serious or intense for the player.
It’s a good feel game that can give a lot of active time in VR.
It is a really simple game, but well worth the 2.99. It’s a really great way to get out your aggression after a looooong day.

reviews.review_title: 🥊 Creative and Spooky Take on VR Boxing
reviews.review_description:
Punch brings a refreshing twist to the VR boxing genre, combining fitness, reflex training, and Halloween flair into one energetic experience. Set in a spooky atmosphere filled with eerie music, creepy clowns, and fun special effects, this game delivers both tension and entertainment.

What really makes Punch stand out is its creativity — you’re not just throwing fists, but swinging guitars, bats, and even hoover guns to take down enemies. Each level adds layers of challenge, from facing multiple foes with varied attacks to an epic boss fight finale.

It’s clear that a lot of care and imagination went into designing Punch. The result is a surprising, inventive, and genuinely fun VR experience that’s perfect for anyone looking to move, laugh, and maybe jump a little.
Great stress relief, perfect after a long day.
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ — Love it! Simple, funny, and addictive.
I love the game its fun and a work out.
Enjoyed it! Thanks for the promo code. 😊😊😊
Works well and looks good, but I expected a bit more content
